title: Google Keep Intergration
excerpt: I am keeping my tasks in google keep, and I want to integrate it to my Monday board, how can I achieve that?

posts.author: amirz (Amir Zak)
posts.cookedHtml: I am keeping my tasks in google keep, and I want to integrate it to my Monday board, how can I achieve that?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amirz - you could look into utilizing make.com to build an integration between monday and Google Keep. Here is a make.com article describing the process and connection points available:

Google Keep (make.com)

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @amirz

You can definitely integrate Google Keep with your Monday.com board, but since Google Keep doesn’t have a native integration with Monday, you’d need to use an automation tool like Zapier or Make to bridge the gap.

Use either tool to set up triggers and actions. For example, when you create or update a note in Google Keep, Zapier/Make can automatically create a new task or update an existing one in Monday.com.
Google Keep Choose New Note as the trigger event.
Monday.com → Set the action to “Create an Item” or Update an Item on your Monday board.
Map fields like note title, content, and tags to the respective fields on Monday.com.
If your Google Keep tasks are synced to Google Sheets(using a Keep to Sheets add-on), you can create a Zap that triggers when a new row is added/updated in Sheets, which in turn creates or updates tasks in Monday.com.

This setup ensures that all your tasks in Google Keep are reflected in your Monday board, streamlining your workflow.

Let me know if you need help setting up any of these steps!
